title: Cadet X Multiplier
description: Cadet X Multiplier is a variation on the Cadet VI Fader circuit, configured as a switchable 2-quadrant or 4-quadrant multiplier.

seo.description: Cadet X Multiplier is a variation on the Cadet VI Fader circuit, configured as a switchable 2-quadrant or 4-quadrant multiplier.
